title: [CIRCT-VERILOG][ARC] arcilator fails on valid SystemVerilog always_ff with async reset

features.name: always_ff procedural block with asynchronous reset
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block with an asynchronous reset in the sensitivity list using 'or posedge rst' syntax
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk or posedge rst) if (rst) r <= 0; else r <= 0;

features.name: non-blocking assignment with reset condition in always_ff
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with an if-else reset condition inside an always_ff block
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk or posedge rst) if (rst) r <= 0; else r <= 0;

features.name: logic variable driven by always_ff with async reset
features.description: Code should include a logic variable assigned via non-blocking assignment within an always_ff block that has an asynchronous reset
features.snippet:
logic r;
always_ff @(posedge clk or posedge rst) if (rst) r <= 0; else r <= 0;
